name: AR Automation - WF3A: QB Payment Link Integration v2.1

parameters.name: query
parameters.value: =SELECT * FROM Invoice WHERE MetaData.CreateTime >= '{{ $now.minus({minutes: $('Merge Config + Token').first().json.invoice_lookback_minutes || 6}).toISO() }}' AND BillEmail IS NOT NULL AND EmailStatus = 'NeedToSend'

nodes.name: Has New Invoices?
nodes.notes: FIX: Output 0 (TRUE = no_new_invoices is true) = STOP. Output 1 (FALSE = invoices exist) = PROCESS. Connections are SWAPPED from v2.0.

nodes.name: Send Enhanced Invoice Email
nodes.notes: MULTI-CLIENT NOTE: Gmail credential is static. For clients using Outlook, duplicate this node with an Outlook credential and route via a Switch node on invoice_email_provider from config.

parameters.url: ={{ $('Merge Config + Token').first().json.qb_base_url }}/v3/company/{{ $('Merge Config + Token').first().json.qb_realm_id }}/invoice/{{ $('Extract Invoice Data').first().json.invoice_id }}/send

nodes.name: Mark QB Invoice as Sent
nodes.notes: Sets EmailStatus=EmailSent in QB. This is the idempotency gate — prevents duplicate sends on next 5-min run.

nodes.name: Is Error Retriable
nodes.notes: FIX v2.1: Now also checks circuit_breaker_tripped. TRUE = send to DLQ. FALSE = retry (back to Get OAuth Credentials).

parameters.jsCode:
const errorInfo = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: {
  timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
  workflow: 'WF3A',
  operation: 'QB Payment Link Integration',
  error_type: errorInfo.error_type,
  error_message: errorInfo.error_message,
  http_code: errorInfo.http_code,
  client_id: errorInfo.client_id,
  client_name: errorInfo.client_name,
  retry_count: errorInfo.retry_count,
  action_required: errorInfo.action_required,
  status: 'pending_manual_review',
  resolved: false
}}];

parameters.content:
## WF3A v2.1 — QB Payment Link Integration (Multi-Client)

**Changes from v2.0:**
• Multi-client: reads Client_Master_Config sheet
• FIXED: Has New Invoices? IF logic was inverted
• FIXED: Removed dead QB: Get New Invoices node
• FIXED: Log Payment Link now upserts on qb_invoice_id
• FIXED: Analyze QB API Error referenced wrong node
• FIXED: Lookback window matches cron interval (6 min)
• NEW: Circuit breaker — max 3 retries before DLQ
• NEW: Merge Config + Token node for clean context
• ALL QB URLs now dynamic from config
• minorversion standardized to 73

**Sandbox enforced:** All clients route to sandbox
until environment = 'production' in config sheet.
